region_groups.name: California & Hawaii
region_groups.description: Pacific specialty-crop powerhouse and tropical Hawaii—year-round production in many lowland California zones and uniquely island crop calendars.

regions.name: California
regions.description: California grows a third of U.S. vegetables and two-thirds of fruits and nuts—Coastal, Central Valley, and desert districts each shift peak months for the same crop.

regions.name: Hawaii
regions.description: Hawaii’s tropics and microclimates yield coffee, macadamia, tropical fruit, and year-round warm-season produce—local calendars differ from every mainland region.
